name: X-Golf Frisco
address: 5977 Preston Rd Retail Building 1, Suite 500, Frisco, TX 75034
about: X-Golf Frisco is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a state-of-the-art golfing experience in a modern, welcoming environment. The facility is equipped with advanced X-Golf simulators featuring precise ball tracking, realistic graphics, and technology combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for unparalleled accuracy. It is designed for a wide range of activities including casual play, competitive leagues, group events, and individual practice. Pricing is based on an hourly rate per simulator bay, with options to extend sessions, and an hourly slot provides approximately 55 minutes of play time. The venue also features a full bar and kitchen, positioning it as a comprehensive golf and social destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology providing realistic ball flight and course play
Comprehensive event hosting capabilities for corporate and private parties
A wide variety of golf leagues offering structured, competitive play
Full-service bar and kitchen available for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available serving a full menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, X-Golf Frisco has a full kitchen and bar on-site, and it is not a BYOB venue. Food and drinks can be purchased directly from the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes of golf equals 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Frisco hosts field trips and is suitable for families and children.
